arts.ttl: Manchester United offer Marcus Rashford to AC Milan
arts.sum: As the winter transfer window heats up, AC Milan find themselves at the centre of a potentially game-changing opportunity. Despite January typically being a quiet month for major transfers, the Rossoneri might secure a significant addition to their squad in the form of Marcus Rashford, the English striker currently out of favor at Manchester United.
